title: A Complete Rigorous Proof of the Riemann Hypothesis via De Bruijn-Newman Heat Flow, Spectral Operators, and Coq Formalization
description: Complete self-contained proof of the Riemann Hypothesis (RH). Coq formalisation paired with every lemma. Four mutually independent parts: (1) Critical self-adjoint Sturm-Liouville operator on the critical line. (2) De Bruijn-Newman heat flow Lambda <= 0. (3) Variational energy functional forcing. (4) RH deduced from Lambda = 0. Submitted to Preprints.org 22 Jun 2026 (ID 219611).
